# Test fixtures

- `docx/` - sample `.docx` files for the DOCX font scanner.
- `fonts/` - OPEN font files only.

Never commit proprietary font binaries (Microsoft / Apple / Adobe / Monotype / foundry) here or
anywhere in this repo. Proprietary-oracle measurements are reproduced locally against the user's own
legally installed fonts (the BYO model); they are never checked in.
